task_completion.description: Import the USLCI database into OpenLCA
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenLCA navigation panel shows an active database corresponding to the imported USLCI database.

task_completion.description: Create a new process named 'Electric Kettle Manufacturing'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenLCA editor shows a process tab or window titled 'Electric Kettle Manufacturing'.

task_completion.description: Add the 5 BOM items as inputs to the process and link them to provider processes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inputs/Outputs tab for the process shows 5 input exchanges matching the BOM materials and amounts (Polypropylene 0.85 kg, Steel 0.45 kg, Copper 0.12 kg, Electricity 1.5 kWh, Packaging 0.3 kg). Each input must have a specific process listed in the 'Provider' column.

task_completion.description: Generate a product system for the 'Electric Kettle Manufacturing' process
task_completion.visual_evidence: A product system tab or node in the navigation tree is visible for 'Electric Kettle Manufacturing'.

task_completion.description: Perform an LCIA calculation using the TRACI 2.1 method
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculation setup dialog showing TRACI 2.1 selected as the impact assessment method, or a results window displaying LCIA results with TRACI 2.1 impact categories.

task_completion.description: Export the LCIA results to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving to '~/LCA_Results/kettle_impact.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing 'kettle_impact.csv' inside the 'LCA_Results' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenLCA graphical interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenLCA application windows, menus, and dialogs.

integrity.description: The LCIA results are genuinely calculated by the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The results window shows complex numerical values and proper UI elements generated by OpenLCA, not manually typed text.

integrity.description: The output CSV was exported from OpenLCA, not manually created
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent manually typing the CSV contents in a text editor or using terminal commands like 'echo' to create the final output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: BOM Items to verify in the process inputs: Polypropylene Casing (0.85 kg), Steel Heating Element (0.45 kg), Copper Wiring (0.12 kg), Assembly Electricity (1.5 kWh), Corrugated Packaging (0.3 kg). Target process name: 'Electric Kettle Manufacturing'. LCIA method: TRACI 2.1. Output file path: /home/ga/LCA_Results/kettle_impact.csv.
